signature.name: Rock Candy Wired Controller for Nintendo Switch

classification.recommendedPath: Use an Xbox controller, or add a hardware XInput adapter such as Mayflash MAGIC-NS 2 / MAGIC-X.

notes: macOS and Chrome can read buttons/axes.
Xbox Cloud in Chrome/Safari did not accept the controller directly.
Software-only path requires Steam Input, but Steam login was not available in this session.

recommendation: Use an Xbox controller, or add a hardware XInput adapter such as Mayflash MAGIC-NS 2 / MAGIC-X.
